input.testCaseTitle: Dam workflow->All 15 PMG are not available in permission bundle.
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-187 reported defect: Dam workflow->All 15 PMG are not available in permission bundle.
input.errorMessage: Dam workflow->All 15 PMG are not available in permission bundle.

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: PMG master objects were not all saved and published, so the DAM workflow permission bundle did not list all 15 PMGs. Publishing the PMG master objects restored the expected permission-bundle entries.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.91. auth-permissions is acceptable because the missing data appeared inside a permission bundle.
